description: §38.13.4 — a MEMBER call `audit.broadcast(row)` in an `<onchange>` arm does NOT fire E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-BROADCAST. The forbidden-set check is an AST call-shape check (a bare `broadcast()`/`disconnect()` primitive), NOT a raw-text regex — a member method call is a different function and stays silent. Locks the fidelity boundary a naive regex-based impl#2 would violate.
rationale: §38.13.4 forbids the channel primitive `broadcast()`/`disconnect()`. A member call `audit.broadcast(row)` invokes a method on `audit`, not the primitive, so E-CHANNEL-WATCHES-BROADCAST does NOT fire (AST call-shape fidelity, not text match).
